app.name: Rulyx
onboarding.title: Bluesky moderation made easy (PL)
onboarding.subtitle: Free  ·  Open source  ·  No ads  ·  No tracking (PL)
onboarding.moderation.title: Moderation (PL)
onboarding.moderation.desc: Browse lists, search for actors, import or export members, and compare lists. (PL)
onboarding.profile.title: Profile (PL)
onboarding.profile.desc: Inspect profiles, view labels and stats, and perform moderation actions. (PL)
onboarding.settings.title: Settings (PL)
onboarding.settings.desc: Manage accounts, clear cache, and review data classification. (PL)

onboarding.info.desc: Learn about the app, review workflows, and access privacy information. (PL)

onboarding.accounts.desc: Switch between saved accounts, add new accounts, and manage account labels. (PL)

settings.title: Settings (PL)

settings.clear_cache.message: Saved accounts and app passwords will not be removed. (PL)
info.keychain.title: Keychain-secured (PL)
info.keychain.desc: Account secrets never leave your device. All API calls go directly to your Bluesky PDS. (PL)
info.clearsky.desc: Blocking and blocked-by data is provided by ClearSky. ClearSky indexes block records from the Bluesky firehose and makes them available via a public API. No authentication is required. (PL)
info.legal.author: Author (PL)

profile.save_search.hint: Saves this search for quick access later (PL)

profile.no_lists: No owned lists available for membership comparison. (PL)
profile.no_starter_packs: No owned starter packs available for membership comparison. (PL)

profile.result.hint: Shows detailed profile information for this account (PL)

list.detail.subscribe.label: Subscribe (PL)

list.detail.remove_message: This removes {count} selected member(s) from the list. (PL)
list.members.filter_accessibility: Filter members by handle or name (PL)
list.compare.title: Compare and Transfer (PL)
list.compare.no_lists_desc: Create additional lists to use comparison and transfer tools. (PL)
list.compare.help_overlap: Overlap: members present in both lists. (PL)
list.compare.help_only_current: Only in current list: members unique to this list. (PL)
list.compare.help_only_other: Only in comparison list: members in the other list but not this one. (PL)
list.compare.help_copy: Copy adds selected members from the compared list to this list without affecting the source. (PL)
list.compare.help_move: Move transfers selected members from this list to the other, removing them from this list. (PL)
list.snapshot.title: Snapshot History (PL)
list.snapshot.no_changes: No membership changes in this comparison. (PL)
list.snapshot.help_1: Snapshots capture the full membership of this list at a point in time. (PL)
list.snapshot.help_2: Use the pickers to compare two historical snapshots and see what changed. (PL)
list.snapshot.help_3: New snapshots are created automatically after bulk operations. (PL)
list.snapshot.help_4: The diff shows exactly which members were added or removed between snapshots. (PL)
list.snapshot.help_5: Snapshots are stored locally and tied to this workspace. (PL)
list.import.title: Import Handles (PL)
list.import.paste_section: Paste Handles, DIDs, or Profile URLs (PL)
list.import.help_3: CSV rows with handles, DIDs, or profile URLs (PL)
list.import.help_5: Duplicate and already-present entries will be detected before import. (PL)
list.import_preview.title: Import Review (PL)
list.import_preview.skip_note: Already-present accounts will be skipped during import. (PL)
list.import_preview.help_ready: Ready: These accounts will be added to the list. (PL)
list.import_preview.help_already: Already in List: These accounts are already members and will be skipped. (PL)
list.import_preview.help_duplicate: Duplicate: Multiple entries in your import resolve to the same account. (PL)
list.import_preview.help_unresolved: Unresolved: These identifiers could not be found on Bluesky. (PL)
list.import_preview.help_write: Importing writes to the live Bluesky list immediately. (PL)

profile.block_all_warning: Warning: This will block every follower of this account. Use with caution.

info.feature.lists.browse: Przeglądaj listy kuratorskie i moderacyjne z wbudowanym wyszukiwaniem i filtrowaniem.
info.feature.lists.bulk: Dodawaj, usuwaj, kopiuj lub przenoś członków zbiorczo ze śledzeniem postępu.
info.feature.lists.import: Importuj handle z tekstu, CSV lub plików — podgląd przed zatwierdzeniem.
info.feature.lists.export: Eksportuj listy członków i wyniki diff do CSV.
info.feature.compare.compare: Porównuj listy i przeglądaj nakładanie się, tylko-w-A i tylko-w-B.
info.feature.compare.transfer: Kopiuj lub przenoś wybranych członków między listami zbiorczo.
info.feature.compare.export: Eksportuj różnice do przeglądu offline lub archiwizacji.
info.feature.export.posts: Eksportuj posty profilu do CSV lub JSON do przeglądu, udostępniania lub archiwizacji.
info.feature.export.media: Przeglądaj obrazy i filmy za pomocą lekkich miniaturek przed otwarciem pełnych podglądów.
info.feature.export.download: Pobieraj wybrane media do folderu z nazwami opartymi na czasie utworzenia i zwartym raportem błędów.
info.feature.moderation.block: Blokuj lub wyciszaj z poziomu profilu z oknem potwierdzenia.
info.feature.moderation.block_all: Zablokuj wszystkich obserwujących konto — zadanie w tle.
info.feature.moderation.membership: Przeglądaj i zmieniaj członkostwo w listach moderacyjnych bezpośrednio z profilu.
info.feature.audit.snapshots: Lokalne migawki list przy każdym załadowaniu — porównaj dowolne dwie.
info.feature.audit.log: Dziennik operacji z liczbą sukcesów i porażek.
info.feature.audit.pending: Arkusz oczekujących akcji z postępem i możliwością ponowienia.
info.feature.audit.searches: Zapisane i ostatnie wyszukiwania profili pozostają między sesjami.
